signals.headline: US-Iran Talks Reach Stalemate Over Strait of Hormuz; Kushner Part of US Delegation Pushing Narrow De-Escalation Deal | N
signals.raw:
US-Iran Talks Reach Stalemate Over Strait of Hormuz; Kushner Part of US Delegation Pushing Narrow De-Escalation Deal | NO | MED confidence** [1][2][3]

Recent reports confirm ongoing US-Iran negotiations involving **Jared Kushner** as a key US envoy alongside VP JD Vance and Steve Witkoff, focused on de-escalation in the Strait of Hormuz, detainees, and nuclear issues amid the 2026 Iran war.[1][3]
matched_markets: Will 150 or more ships transit the Strait of Hormuz between April 20-April 26?
Will 60 ships transit the Strait of Hormuz on any day by April 30?
Will Jared Kushner have a diplomatic meeting with Iran by April 30?

signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rose to 2.2% YoY (from 2.0% in Feb), undershooting market forecasts of 2.3-2.4% due to government fuel caps offsetting oil price surges | NO | HIGH confidence** [1][2][4]

matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?
